title: Baxter India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Baxter India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Baxter India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!
